title: Windows Administrative Share Access Spike
description: Detects repeated Security Event IDs 5140 and 5145 against administrative shares such as C$, ADMIN$, and IPC$, which can indicate lateral movement or data harvesting.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' in ('5140', '5145') and ('Share Name' like '*C$*' or 'Share Name' like '*ADMIN$*' or 'Share Name' like '*IPC$*' or msg like '*Share Name*') | stats count as ShareEvents, unique('Share Name') as Shares, unique('Relative Target Name') as Targets by User, 'Source Address', 'Host Name (Server)' | where ShareEvents > 2 | sort -ShareEvents
falsepositives: Backup, software distribution, vulnerability scanning, or endpoint management activity

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 5140(S,F) A network share object was accessed
Microsoft Learn: 5145(S,F) A network share object was checked
